form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on March 25 over 366m at this track behind From A Distance beaten 6 lengths (20.09). Has a fast 19.8 PB at this course and distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 366m at this track beaten 6 lengths (20.49) behind Crab Pot in a Grade 3/4 on March 22. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 352m at Q Lakeside. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Q Straight then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when fourth (20.30) at Q Lakeside. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.59) at Q Lakeside in a P5, finishing eighth and beaten 11 lengths. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by a neck at Q Straight over 300m (16.74) beating Shine And Fire in Grade 5 on March 30. Expected to run well again.
